notes: Zoho CRM Module Entry triggers use Zoho's Notifications API (vendor-side webhook subscription). Contact/Lead/User triggers are polled.

triggers.name: New Contact
triggers.description: Fires when a new contact is created.

triggers.name: New Lead
triggers.description: Fires when a new lead is created.

triggers.name: New Module Entry
triggers.description: Fires instantaneously when any entry is created in the specified module.

triggers.name: New or Updated Contact
triggers.description: Fires when a contact is added or modified.

triggers.name: New or Updated Lead
triggers.description: Fires when a lead is added or modified.

triggers.name: New User
triggers.description: Fires when a new active user is added to your account.

triggers.name: New/Updated Module Entry
triggers.description: Fires instantaneously when any entry is created or updated in the specified module.

output.summary: Zoho CRM notification payload (insert or update)

triggers.name: Updated Module Entry
triggers.description: Fires instantaneously when a module entry is updated.
